name: On Cloud 9
author: Suresh Padmanabhan
description:
When you are ready and lucky, this book will find youMaya is the main character of this fictional book. She is going through her dark days. At the right time of her life, she comes across Guruji?a man of wisdom?and various other women who impact her. Sunshine returns back into her life. But this book is not about Maya, it is about you and your journey. At this point, you may be in any season of your life?cold winter, stormy rains, melancholic autumn, sunny summer, or the flowering spring. Within this book, you will discover an ocean of truths, insights, and inspiration to transport you to the happy-happy season of your liking. This book is woven with mysticism, imagery, poetry, philosophy, and practical solutions where you will discover answers to the most vital aspect of your life:

Are woman the weaker sex?
Understanding all the four M?s?Marriage, Men, Money, and Motherhood
Handling the tough phases of life be it Divorce, Depression, or Denial
Profound differences of opinions between the Western and Indian culture
Rise above the life challenges and catapult into an outstanding success
Techniques, tools, and meditations which will bring cheer, hope, and a sense of belonging

Women love mirrors and it is their best companion hidden in the hand bags or adorns their room. ?On cloud 9? is a mirror which will help you to make over, re-invent, and re-discover yourself.This book will help you to fall in love once again, with the most beautiful person in the world?YOU.

name: Gate Keeper
author: R. KeshavaMurthy
categories: Inside of World Classic Cinemas - An Analysis by R. KeshavaMurthy
description: ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಬರಹಗಳೆಂದರೆ ಅದು ಸಾಹಿತ್ಯವಲ್ಲ, ಕೇವಲ ವರ್ಣರಂಜಿತ ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳು ಎನ್ನುವ ಭಾವನೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಹಿಂದಿನಿಂದಲೂ ಇದೆ. ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಮಾಧ್ಯಮ ಕೂಡ ಮೇಲೂ ನೋಟಕ್ಕೆ ಹಾಗೆ ಅನಿಸಿದರೂ ಕಥೆ, ಕವನ, ಕಾದಂಬರಿ ಅಥವಾ ಆತ್ಮ ಕಥೆಗಳ ಮೂಲಕ ಗಂಭೀರವಾದ ಸಾಹಿತ್ಯವೊಂದು ಕಟ್ಟಿಕೊಡುವ ಬದುಕಿನ ಅನುಭೂತಿ, ಸಿನಿಮಾದಲ್ಲೂ ಸಾಧ್ಯ ಎಂಬುದನ್ನು ‘ಗೇಟ್ ಕೀಪರ್’ ಪುಸ್ತಕ ಹೇಳುತ್ತದೆ. ಈ ಕೃತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಜಗತ್ತಿನ ಹತ್ತಾರು ಭಾಷೆ, ನೂರಾರು ಬದುಕಿನ ಒಳ ಚಿತ್ರಣಗಳ ಕಥನಾಗಳು ಇವೆ. ಅಂಥ ಕಥನಗಳ ಜತೆಗೆ ನಮ್ಮ ಸಿನಿಮಾ- ಬದುಕನ್ನೂ ಸಹ ಪಕ್ಕದಲ್ಲಿಟ್ಟು ನೋಡುವ ಸ್ಮೂಕ್ಷ್ಮ ಸಂವೇದನೆಯ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನವೂ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ. ಕನ್ನಡದ ಜತೆಗೆ ಬೆಂಗಾಲಿ, ಹಿಂದಿ, ಮರಾಠಿ, ಗುಜರಾತಿ, ಮಲಯಾಳಂ, ಇರಾನ್, ಕೊರಿಯಾ, ಫ್ರೆಂಚ್, ಇಟಲಿ, ಚೈನಾ, ಜಪಾನ್, ಬ್ರೆಜಿಲ್... ಹೀಗೆ ಜಗತ್ತಿನ ಹಲವು ಕ್ಲಾಸಿಕ್ ಚಿತ್ರಗಳ ಒಳ ನೋಟಗಳು ಇಲ್ಲಿವೆ. ಓದುವ ಅಭಿರುಚಿ ಹೊಂದಿದ ಓದುಗನೊಬ್ಬ ಒಂದೇ ಗುಕ್ಕಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಓದಿ ಮುಗಿಸುವಷ್ಟು ಕುತೂಹಲ, ರೋಚಕತೆ, ಅಭಿರುಚಿ ಮೂಡಿಸುವ ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಸಾಹಿತ್ಯ ಕೃತಿಯಿದು. ತೆರೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಬಣ್ಣಗಳ ಮೂಲಕವೋ, ಸುಂದರವಾದ ಲೊಕೇಷನ್ ಮೂಲಕವೋ, ಭಾವನೆಗಳನ್ನು ಮೀಟುವ ಹಾಡುಗಳ ಮೂಲಕವೋ, ಮನಸ್ಸಿನ ಮೇಲೆ ಸವಾರಿ ಮಾಡುವಷ್ಟು ಚುರುಕಾದ ಸಂಭಾಷಣೆಗಳ ಮೂಲಕವೋ ಪ್ರೇಕ್ಷಕನನ್ನು ಹಿಡಿದಿಟ್ಟುಕೊಂಡು ಕೊನೆ ತನಕ ಸಾಗುವ ಹಾಗೆ ಕೃತಿಯ ಪ್ರತಿಯೊಂದು ಅಧ್ಯಾಯವೂ ಅಂತಹದ್ದೇ ಕುತೂಹಲ, ರೋಚಕತೆಯೊಂದಿಗೆ ಸಾಗುತ್ತವೆ ಎಂಬುದು ‘ಗೇಟ್ ಕೀಪರ್’ ಕೃತಿಯ ಹೆಚ್ಚುಗಾರಿಕೆ. ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಪ್ರೇಮಿಗಳಿಗೆ, ಸಿನಿಮಾ ವಿದ್ಯಾರ್ಥಿಗಳಿಗೆ, ಜಗತ್ತಿನ ಕ್ಲಾಸಿಕ್ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳ ಮೋಡಿ ಒಳಗಾದವರಿಗೆ, ಈಗಷ್ಟೆ ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಕನಸು ಕಟ್ಟಿಕೊಂಡು, ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಕತೆಗಳ ಕಟ್ಟುವ ದಾರಿಯಲ್ಲಿರುವ ಉತ್ಸಾಹಿ ಸಿನಿ ಕೃಷಿಕರಿಗೆ ಈ ಪುಸ್ತಕ ಸದಾ ಜತೆಯಾಗಿರುವ ಅರ್ಹತೆಯನ್ನು ಹೊಂದಿದೆ.

name: Kathe Chitrakathe Sambhashane
author: Jogi
description: Kathe,chitrakathe, Sambhashane is a unique book on Screen writing in Kannada. It is first of the kind, wherein 19 eminent directors, screen writers and authors have written their experiences of Film making process. An Indian approach to Screen writing has been explored by the author Jogi. Well-known directors like Girish Kasaravalli, Prakash Raj, B. Suresha, Yogaraj Bhat, Duniya Suri, Rakshith Shetty, B S Lingadevaru and many others are included in the book. About The Author: Girish Rao Hatwar, popularly known as Jogi, is an author of 50 books in Kannada. He is a Journalist, Screen writer, Short story writer, columnist and playwriter. He has written 10 novels, 10 short story collections, 10 books of column writing, one play and his book on Story telling techniques "Halage Balapa" is very popular among young writers. Now he has come up with a book on Screen writing for the beginners.

name: Uppigintha Ruchi Bere Illa
author: Ramaswamy Hulakodu
description: This book is a feast for everyone. Upendra the director, actor and marvelous story teller of our times is one among those few who pushed the horizons of Kannada movie industry. His catchy and often thought provoking dialogues are the quintessence of his movies. This book written by Ramaswamy Hulakodu revisits those celebrated dialogues and dissects them to the core to show their relevance in everyday life. The insightful tips and thought provoking quotes given by the author are an additional bonus for the readers. What a way to motivate tormented souls!

name: Ananthadedege
author: Na.Someswara
categories: unique book hither to unheard in Kannada literature
description:
'Oh nanna chetana!...' Which literally means 'Oh my spirit!....' is an anthology of short anecdotes, fables, stories, incidences collected from various sources like Ramayana, Mahabharata, Bible, Quran, Jainism, Buddhism, Zen stories and many more. There are 50 such stories. Each story has a definite plan. First part contains a story. A well-known story is retold in a simple language. The second part is the discussion part. This has three sections

The first section summarizes the moral/s of the story.
Understanding all the four M?s?Marriage, Men, Money, and Motherhood
The second section allows participants to share similar anecdotes or stories of their own.
The third section contains thoughts for an individual's musing. This helps an individual to gain an insight in to himself, helping him to become a better human being.

A group of 20-25 likeminded people may start the session. There is no designated leader. There is an opportunity for everyone to become leader and lead the discussion. 


One person takes the role of a leader and initiates the discussion by reading a story of his choice loudly from the book. Everybody has to listen to the story attentively.
The person after his render invites people to summarize the moral/s of the story. Every story has a minimum of three morals. There could be many more. These may emerge during the discussion. Others may note down these additional morals in the space provided for the said purpose in the book.
In the second part of the discussion, the participants are encouraged to share a similar experience, incidence, story, anecdotes from their own life. They may also free to narrate from their friends, relatives' life too. They are free to share similar incidences which they might have come across in some books or seen in movies. The participants should discuss actively and provide suitable practical solutions also.
In the third part, every participant has to analyze the moral of the story pertaining to his own life or family.
After completing all the steps successfully, another person may start reading another story and the chain continues......


'Oh nanna chetana!...' is a unique book hither to unheard in Kannada literature.

name: 101 Vol 1
author: Joji Valli
description: Heart is the centre of everything and source of all goodness. 101carefully selected topics illustrate the multi-faceted human life in a day to day basis. Each of these topics conveys the awareness which is forgotten in the routine of a busy life. 101 Vol.1 imparts the wisdom of the ages from various religious traditions and backgrounds, and is the first of a series of books on personal power, spiritual awareness and human values. 101 Vol.1 provides answers for the why's and how's of daily problems that occur in routine life. The author tries to brush up the hidden treasures in each individual, empowering personal powers. Sometimes we are ignorant of the powers or treasures within us, and look for solace and happiness outside of ourselves. 101 Vol.1 encapsulates the personal powers each of us has within and empowers it with awareness for happiness and contentment. Besides providing wholesome reading pleasure, 101 Vol.1 awakens individual's awareness and thereby leads to a happy and tension free life. The moment awareness occurs in life thereon life becomes beautiful, beauty surrounds, optimism prevails, miracles occur and we begin to experience the grandeur of God/Existence.101 Vol. 1 is an ideal present for a person of any age, who searches happiness and contentment amidst the modernization and development.

name: I Love Money
author: Suresh Padmanabhan
description: The biggest lie you ever heard about Money is, "Money is not important in life." Money is as vital as mother's milk to a new born baby or blood flowing in our body. Whether you love it or hate it, you simply cannot live without it. Every product you buy has an instructions manual that helps in troubleshooting and also ensures the perfect handling of the product. Shouldn't Money also have an instructions manual? Do you have the original instructions manual of Money? This book is all about Money the most neglected and rarely spoken about. Discover the original instructions manual of Money and you will stumble upon the Ultimate Secrets of Money. This book will help you discover - A clear money blue print for you, your family or your organisation. - Amazing insights on money, wealth creation and prosperity. - Exact process of how money comes and goes out of your life. - Identify and remove the behaviour, which drain out money. - Powerful money rituals that can transform your money world - How to attract Money, how to recover stuck money, receiving and giving, spending and saving, money and hard-work, the power of saying NO and lots of powerful methods to catapult you to great success. All these techniques are tried & tested through the Money WorkshopTM for the past seven years and with over 25000 participants.

name: Kaasu Panam Dhuddu Money Money
author: Rajesh Shetty
categories: A book on Self help finance
description: A book on Self help finance

name: The Art and Science of Studying
author: Dr. Dharitri Ramaprasad
description: This simple to read and follow book provides insights into the process of effective study methods. The book recommends some simple methods which can be practiced and mastered to make studying effective. The stepwise explanation and practice tips will help students learn effectively by improving concentration and comprehension. Tips on techniques to remember would be useful for the students to improve their academic performance. Last but not the least this can make studies enjoyable and meaningful.

name: U have an excuse I have an exercise
author: Wanitha Ashok
description: Being a state level athlete I was always active and on my toes. I always wanted to be a thin person; I'd told myself, when I grow up and have children, I will make sure I remain thin. That was the approach I had towards exercising.Ever tried buying half a kilo strength, 2 kgs of muscles, 500 gms of endurance and two lts of stamina? It is impossible. You have to work upon it to achieve it, and the results are worth it. But nothing is for keeps sake. Once we stop exercising, we lose out on what we have gained.therefore, exercising is a lifelong affair. We can buy nutrition over the counter, whereas the exercise benefits have to be worked upon and cannot be bought.Embrace exercises. Change your life, change the way you look, empower yourself, gain confidence, prevent, control and cure lifestyle diseases. Do it simply for your health and fitness rather than weight loss.

name: Pranesh Payana
author: Gangavathi Pranesh
description: A collection of Humorous Moral Essays.

author: Ashaa Dalal
description: "Know your number" by Ashaa Dalal offers a wonderful package to beginners who are interested in the science of numerology. This book describes the process in simple steps which makes it easy for learners and can be a wonderful guide for those who want to indulge themselves in the practice.

name: Self Mastery

description: Self Mastery acts as a guide, a friend who tells you how to get out of your ordeals and build a beautiful life. And it does so by working on your relationship management, communication, intellect, mindset, health and so on. I do not suggest Self Mastery to all and sundry.

name: Rajkumar Matthashtu Mukhagalu
author: Katte Gururaj
categories: A collection of anecdotes of Rajkumar
description:
‘ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರ್ ಬಹಳ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಬಿಡ್ರೀ.. ಬಿಳೀ ಪಂಚೆ, ಷರಟು ಮಾತ್ರ ಧರಿಸೋರು’. ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರ್ ಅವರ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಬಂದಾಗೆಲ್ಲ ಈ ಮಾತು ಬರೋದು. ದಶಕಗಳ ಕಾಲ ಅದು ಹೇಗೆ ಬರೀ ಪಂಚೆ, ಷರಟು ಧರಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ. ಪ್ಯಾಂಟು ಏಕೆ ಹಾಕಲಿಲ್ಲ, ಬರೀ ಪಂಚೆ, ಷರಟು ಹಾಕಿದರೆ ಮಾತ್ರ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ಲಾ?  ಅದರೊಳಗೆ ಸೇರೋ ದೇಹಕ್ಕೊಂದು ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿತ್ವ ಮುಖ್ಯ ಅಲ್ವಾ? ಅದು ಹೇಗಿತ್ತು ಅನ್ನೋ ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆಗೆ ಮತ್ತದೆ ಪಂಚೆ ಷರಟುಗಳ ಉತ್ತರವೇ ಬರುತ್ತಿತ್ತು. ಹುಟ್ಟೂರು, ಓಡಾಡಿದ ಜಾಗ ಗುರುತು ಮಾಡಿ, ಅವರಿಟ್ಟ ಹೆಜ್ಜೆ ಗುರುತುಗಳ ಮೇಲೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನಮ್ಮ ಹೆಜ್ಜೆ ಊರುತ್ತಾ, ಉರುಳು ಸೇವೆ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದ ನಂಜನಗೂಡಲ್ಲಿ ಅಲೆದಾಡುತ್ತಾ, ಇಷ್ಟಪಟ್ಟು ತಿನ್ನುತ್ತಿದ್ದ ಹೋಟೆಲ್‌ಗಳೆಲ್ಲಾ ಹುಡುಕಾಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾಗ ಅರ್ಥವಾಗಿದ್ದು ಏನೆಂದರೆ, ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರ್ ಸಿಂಪಲ್‌ನ ಸೂತ್ರಧಾರ ಮತ್ಯಾರು ಅಲ್ಲ, ಕೊನೇತನಕ ಅವರೊಳಗಿದ್ದ ಮುತ್ತುರಾಜನೇ ಅನ್ನೋದು.
ನಾನಾಗಲಿ, ನೀವಾಗಲಿ, ಯಾವ ನಟರೇ ಆಗಲಿ, ವೃತ್ತಿ ಜೀವನಕ್ಕೆ ಕಾಲಿಡುವ ಆರಂಭದಲ್ಲಿ ಅವರೊಳಗಿರುವ ಮುಗ್ಧತೆ, ಆ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿತ್ವ ಆಮೇಲಾಮೇಲೆ ಅವರಲ್ಲಿ ಇರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. ಅದರಲ್ಲೂ, ಹೆಸರು, ಹಣ ದಕ್ಕಿದಾಗಲಂತೂ ತನ್ನೊಳಗೆ ಮೂಲ ವಿಗ್ರಹದ ಥರ ಇರೋ  ಮುಗ್ಧತೆ  ಕಾಣೆಯಾಗಿಬಿಡುತ್ತದೆ. ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರರು ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಅಪವಾದ. ಸಿನಿಮಾದಲ್ಲಿ ಪಾರ್ಟ್ ಕೇಳಿಕೊಂಡು ಅಪ್ಪನ ಜೊತೆ ಮದರಾಸಿಗೆ ಹೋದಾಗ ಇದ್ದ ಮುಗ್ಧತೆ, ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರನಾಗಿ, ಹೆಸರು, ಹಣ, ಜನಪ್ರಿಯತೆ ಎಲ್ಲ ಗಳಿಸಿದ ಮೇಲೂ ಆಂತರ್ಯದಲ್ಲಿ ಹಾಗೇ ಬದುಕಿತ್ತು. ನಮಗೆಲ್ಲಾ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಆಗಿ ಕಾಣ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದದ್ದು ರಾಜ್ಕುಮಾರರಾದರೂ ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಕಾರಣೀಭೂತರು ಈ ಮುತ್ತುರಾಜ್. ಸಿಂಪಲ್‌ಗೆ ಸ್ಯಾಂಪಲ್ ಆಗಿರೋ ಅವರನ್ನು ಈ ಪುಸ್ತಕದಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿಡಿದಿಟ್ಟಿದ್ದೇವೆ..

name: Yashasvibhava
author: Dr. Yandamoori Veerendranath
description:
ಡಾ. ಯಂಡಮೂರಿ ವೀರೇಂದ್ರನಾಥ್ ಏನು ಬರೆದರೂ ಆಸಕ್ತಿಕರವಾಗಿ ಬರೆಯುತ್ತಾರೆ. ಒಂದು ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂನಲ್ಲಿ ಪತ್ರಕರ್ತರೊಬ್ಬರು, ‘ನೀವು ನಾಟಕ, ಕಥೆ, ಕಾದಂಬರಿ ಮತ್ತು ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿತ್ವ ವಿಕಸನದ ಪುಸ್ತಕಗಳನ್ನು ಬರೆದಿದ್ದೀರಿ. ಇವೆಲ್ಲಕ್ಕೂ ಇರುವ ಕಾಮನ್ ಫ್ಯಾಕ್ಟರ್ ಯಾವುದು?’ ಎಂದು ಕೇಳಿದಾಗ,  “ರೀಡಬಿಲಿಟಿ” ಎಂದು ಉತ್ತರಿಸಿದ್ದರು ಯಂಡಮೂರಿ.
ಹೌದು, ಅವರ ಪುಸ್ತಕಗಳ ಪ್ರಕಾರ ಯಾವುದೇ ಆದರೂ ಸುಲಭವಾಗಿ ಓದಿಸಿಕೊಂಡು ಹೋಗುತ್ತವೆ.
ಪ್ರಸ್ತುತ ಪುಸ್ತಕದಲ್ಲಿ ಅವರ ಅನುಭವಗಳು, ಅವರ ಆಲೋಚನೆಗಳು ಮುಂತಾದುವನ್ನು ಬಹಳ ಸ್ವಾರಸ್ಯಕರವಾಗಿ ವಿವರಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.  ಎಲ್ಲರಿಗೂ ಇಷ್ಟವಾಗುವ ಕಥಾರೂಪದಲ್ಲಿಯೂ ಹೇಳಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
ನಮ್ಮ ಸ್ವಂತ ವಿಕಾಸದಿಂದ ಹಿಡಿದು ದೇಶದ ಒಳಿತಿನವರೆಗೂ ವೈವಿಧ್ಯಮಯ ವಿಷಯಗಳು ಈ ಹೊತ್ತಗೆಯಲ್ಲಿ  ಇವೆ.
ಓದುಗರಿಗೆ ಅವರ ಜೀವನದಲ್ಲಿ ವಿಜಯ ಸಿಗಲೆಂದು ಆಶಿಸುವ
ಡಾ. ಯಂಡಮೂರಿ ವೀರೇಂದ್ರನಾಥ್  ಬರೆದಿರುವ ಯಶಸ್ವೀಭವ.

name: Cancerge Answer
author: Dr. Aparna Sreevatsa
description: A handbook on Cancer Treatment written by Oncologist Dr. Aparna Sreevatsa. “Cancer ge Answer” is an information guide on Cancer treatment by Senior Oncologist Dr Aparna Sreevatsa. This book has in depth discussions on Cancer treatment options like chemotherapy, radiotherapy, robotic surgery, targeted therapy, immunotherapy, CAR-T cell therapy and Bone marrow transplant. The book shares tips by Oncologist for diet during Cancer treatment, precautions during treatment and tips to prevent cancer recurrence/relapse. The book explains about hereditary cancers and genetic testing. This book is a must read for patients undergoing cancer treatment and their family and any person who is curious to know about what causes Cancer, association of lifestyle and cancer, symptoms of cancer and screening tests to be done for early detection of cancer in the annual health check.
